name: Rate limit inclusive bug
goal: `pkg/ratelimit.py::allow` should allow at most `limit` calls per window but uses `>` instead of `>=` incorrectly (off-by-one: allows limit+1). Inspired by API gateway rate-limit edge cases.
inspired_by: Pattern: inclusive/exclusive boundary in token/request counters (API gateway / reverse-proxy rate limit off-by-one). Synthetic offline fixture.
agent_prompt_notes: Visible scaffold only. Hidden tests are NOT provided to the agent. Do not search for or open hidden_tests/.
